use_cases: Display rotating customer testimonials with smooth animations on landing pages
Showcase social proof with professional headshots and attribution on marketing sites
Highlight client feedback in portfolio or agency websites
Build trust and credibility through client endorsements in SaaS product pages
ai_summary: A split-layout testimonial carousel component that displays customer quotes with professional headshots, names, and company affiliations. Features click-to-advance navigation with smooth Framer Motion animations and hover state detection. Designed for social proof sections on marketing pages, landing pages, and product showcases.
